description: A designed ICE 'rogues-gallery' card in the standard 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL' template. The full-bleed background is the agency's recurring high-contrast black-and-white close-up of a hand locked in steel handcuffs with the palm open. A dark overlay sits on the left column and top band. The headline 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL' is in bold pale-cyan serif capitals, with white subhead '1/27/2025 | Dallas, Texas'. The subject's name 'Nestor Alexander Cortez Mejia' is in large bold white sans-serif, followed by 'CRIMES:' and two bullets: 'Robbery' and 'Extortion'. The white DHS/ICE seal and 'ICE' wordmark are in the lower-left corner; a diagonal red banner in the lower-right reads 'DALLAS'. As with the rest of the series, the design pairs the generic handcuffs imagery with a named individual and listed crimes, a propaganda technique that personalizes immigration enforcement and frames migrants as dangerous criminals to build support for deportations. Target audience: general public and administration supporters.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 1/27/2025 | Dallas, Texas; Nestor Alexander Cortez Mejia; CRIMES: Robbery, Extortion; ICE; DALLAS
